info.title: Ad Seller System API
info.description: IAB OpenDirect 2.1 compliant seller agent for programmatic advertising. Supports product discovery, tiered pricing, proposal evaluation, multi-round negotiation, deal execution, order management, and change requests.

get.description: API root.
Health check endpoint.
List all products in the catalog.
Get a specific product.

post.description: Get pricing for a product based on buyer context.
Submit a proposal for review.
Generate a deal from an accepted proposal.
Process a discovery query about inventory.

get.description: List events, optionally filtered by flow_id, event_type, or session_id.
Get a specific event by ID.
List all pending approval requests.
Get a specific approval request and its response (if any).

post.description: Submit a human decision for a pending approval.

Resume a flow after an approval decision has been submitted.

Loads the flow state snapshot, applies the decision, and returns
the final result without re-running expensive crew evaluations.
Create a new buyer conversation session.

get.description: List sessions, optionally filtered by buyer identity or status.
Get session details and conversation history.

post.description: Send a message within a session and get a response.
Close a session.

Submit a counter-offer in an ongoing negotiation.

Loads or creates a NegotiationHistory, evaluates the buyer's offer,
persists the updated history, and emits a NEGOTIATION_ROUND event.

get.description: Get full negotiation history for a proposal.
Public media kit catalog overview.
List packages with public view (price ranges, no exact pricing).
Get a single package with public view.

post.description: Search packages by keyword. Authenticated buyers get richer results.

get.description: List packages with tier-gated view.

post.description: Create a curated package (Layer 2).

get.description: Get a single package with tier-gated view.

post.description: Assemble a dynamic package (Layer 3) from product IDs.
Trigger ad server inventory sync (Layer 1).

get.description: List all API keys (metadata only, no secrets).

post.description:
Create a new API key for a buyer.

The response contains the full API key which is shown ONLY ONCE.
Store it securely — it cannot be retrieved again.

get.description: Get details for a specific API key.

delete.description: Revoke an API key. Revoked keys return 401 on use.

get.description:
Serve this seller agent's card for A2A discovery.

Returns an A2A-protocol-compliant agent card describing this
seller's capabilities, supported protocols, and inventory types.
Buyer agents and registries fetch this to discover the seller.

List agents in the local registry.

Filterable by agent_type (buyer, seller, tool_provider, data_provider, other)
and trust_status (unknown, registered, approved, preferred, blocked).
Get details for a specific registered agent.

delete.description: Remove an agent from the local registry.

post.description:
Discover an agent by URL.

Fetches the agent's card from .well-known/agent.json, checks
all configured registries (AAMP + extras) for verification, and
registers the agent locally with appropriate trust status.

put.description:
Update an agent's trust status.

Use this to approve, prefer, or block agents. Trust status determines
the maximum access tier:
- unknown → PUBLIC (price ranges only)
- registered → SEAT (exact prices, no negotiation)
- approved → ADVERTISER (full access)
- preferred → ADVERTISER + custom pricing rules
- blocked → 403 rejected, zero data access

post.description:
Request a non-binding price quote from the seller.

The seller evaluates the request against existing pricing rules and
returns a quote with pricing, terms, and availability. Quotes are
ephemeral with a 24-hour TTL — no Deal ID is created.

get.description:
Retrieve a previously issued quote.

Returns 410 Gone if the quote has expired.

post.description:
Book a deal from a previously issued quote.

The seller validates the quote, generates a Deal ID, and returns
confirmed terms. This is the commit point — the quote becomes bound.

get.description:
Get the current status of a deal.

Performs a lazy expiry check for deals in 'proposed' status.

post.description: Create a new order and persist its state machine.

get.description: List orders, optionally filtered by status.

Summary report across all orders.

Returns counts by status, transition frequency by actor type,
and average time-in-state metrics.
Get order current status and audit trail.
Get the full transition history for an order.

post.description:
Transition an order to a new state.

Validates the transition against the state machine rules and
records the change in the audit log.

Submit a change request for an existing order.

Validates the change against the current order state, classifies
severity, and routes to approval if needed.

get.description: List change requests, optionally filtered by order or status.
Get a change request by ID.

post.description: Approve or reject a pending change request.

Apply an approved change request to the order.

Updates the order with the proposed values from the change request.

get.description:
Detailed audit log for an order with optional filters.

Filters:
  - actor: filter transitions by actor (exact or prefix match)
  - from_date: ISO date, only transitions on or after this date
  - to_date: ISO date, only transitions on or before this date

CounterOfferRequest.description: Request to submit a counter-offer in a negotiation.

CreateApiKeyRequest.description: Request to create a new API key for a buyer.

CreateChangeRequestModel.title: CreateChangeRequestModel
CreateChangeRequestModel.description: Request to create a change request for an order.

CreateOrderRequest.title: CreateOrderRequest
CreateOrderRequest.description: Request to create a new order.

CreateSessionRequest.title: CreateSessionRequest
CreateSessionRequest.description: Request to create a new session.

DiscoverAgentRequest.title: DiscoverAgentRequest
DiscoverAgentRequest.description: Request to discover an agent by URL.

DynamicPackageRequest.title: DynamicPackageRequest
DynamicPackageRequest.description: Request to assemble a dynamic package from product IDs.

PackageCreateRequest.title: PackageCreateRequest
PackageCreateRequest.description: Request to create a curated package.

QuoteBuyerIdentityModel.title: QuoteBuyerIdentityModel
QuoteBuyerIdentityModel.description: Buyer identity in a quote request.

ReviewChangeRequestModel.title: ReviewChangeRequestModel
ReviewChangeRequestModel.description: Approve or reject a change request.

SessionMessageRequest.title: SessionMessageRequest
SessionMessageRequest.description: Request to send a message within a session.

TransitionOrderRequest.title: TransitionOrderRequest
TransitionOrderRequest.description: Request to transition an order to a new state.

UpdateTrustRequest.title: UpdateTrustRequest
UpdateTrustRequest.description: Request to update an agent's trust status.
